trigger_reason: R708 is rank 1 by mechanical-PASS proximity in E29 (kw=2, tree-stream max sim=0.35, q-rubric=0.38). Step 10 verdict=FAIL (kw=2 ≥ 2) but lowest-FAIL-margin in E29. Per program_v10.md §2.5, top-3 rounds receive full step-13 specs even when step 10 / tree-stream do not formally PASS.
candidate_stripped: A Dirichlet-series-based head-pruning signal that treats per-head importance as series coefficients, analytically continues to special points, and uses the continuation values as a pruning criterion alternative to magnitude or attention-entropy methods.

base_model.name: DistilBERT-base (66M params) with N=72 attention heads (12 layers × 6 heads)

A_candidate.name: Dirichlet-continuation prune (R708)
A_candidate.description: Form a Dirichlet series D(s) = Σ a_n/n^s using head importance scores a_n. Analytically continue to s=0 and s=1. Prune heads whose individual contribution to D(0) is below epsilon=0.02.
A_candidate.distinctive_parameter: Continuation values D(s=0), D(s=1) used as pruning thresholds
A_candidate.expected_behavior: If Dirichlet continuation surfaces 'globally unimportant' heads that local magnitude pruning misses, A retains accuracy at higher prune ratio than B.

B_control.name: Magnitude prune baseline
B_control.description: Prune heads by L2 norm of attention weights, with random tie-breaking. Same prune ratio as A.
B_control.expected_behavior: Established pruning baseline (Michel 2019); typical accuracy degradation at given prune ratio.

C_baseline.name: Attention-entropy prune (Voita 2019)
C_baseline.description: Prune heads by attention-entropy; lower entropy = more focused.
C_baseline.expected_behavior: Published baseline; expected to match or beat magnitude.

metric.name: SST-2 dev accuracy at 30% head-prune ratio
metric.measurement_protocol: Train DistilBERT for 3 epochs on SST-2, apply pruning, evaluate on dev. Repeat with 3 seeds (42, 137, 271).

statistical_test.name: Paired t-test A vs B + paired t-test A vs C
statistical_test.expected_outcome_if_candidate_has_value: A significantly outperforms B AND not significantly worse than C at 30% prune.
statistical_test.expected_outcome_if_candidate_collapses_: A indistinguishable from B (Dirichlet continuation amounts to smooth-rescaled magnitude prune).

distinguishability_pre_check.rationale: Dirichlet-series continuation values D(0), D(1) ARE different from raw magnitude in principle (incorporates global series structure: decay rate, sign pattern). However, for smooth importance distribution (typical case), Dirichlet continuation correlates strongly with magnitude. If importance has sharp/oscillatory structure (alternating large+small heads), continuation surfaces non-local features magnitude misses. If importance is monotone decay (common), continuation ≈ smooth rescaling of magnitude.
distinguishability_pre_check.implication: Worth running as human-in-loop pilot. If A indistinguishable from B, R708 is parametrization-only (R279 pattern).

notes_for_executor: Use distilbert-base-uncased. Compute Dirichlet sum via finite truncation N=72; for s=0,1 use direct evaluation (real positive coefficients) or Abel summation for s≤1.
